utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all five top-level items. Next, verify if each is fully specified with all details requested: 1) health_coverage: required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan provides physical_health plan name and cost, and mental_health plan name and cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan provides home_content plan name and cost, plus add-ons with cost. The core requirement (home/contents with costs) is satisfied; add-ons are extra detail. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: required 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan provides plan name and cost, plus add-ons with cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: required 'any enhancement services with costs'. Plan lists services (property_add_ons and travel_add_ons) but does not include their costs here; although costs exist elsewhere, within this item they are not specified with costs. Not fully specified. 5) total_budget: required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Plan provides only monthly_cost, no annual cost breakdown. Not fully specified. Therefore, 3 of 5 items are fully specified.
